zh.lifeSummary: 當Gamail Lord of Carrick於大約1205年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾卡里克時，他的父親Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick32歲，母親Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick28歲。他和Unknown至少有1個女兒。他去世於1275年享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gamail Lord of Carrick于大约1205年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾卡里克时，他的父亲Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick32岁，母亲Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick28岁。他和Unknown至少有1个女儿。他去世于1275年享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gamail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Lebanese Arabic Gemayel, a surname related to Jamal . This form of the surname is also found in Morocco, but it is very rare there. Bearers of the Lebanese surname are Christians.

variants.name: Jamal
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Mohammad, Mohammed, Syed, Abdul, Ali, Nasir, Salim, Tariq, Ahmad, Jamal, Sami, Akbar.
Muslim: from a personal name based on Arabic jamāl ‘beauty, grace’. This name is also found in compounds such as Jamāl ud-Dīn ‘beauty of religion’. Compare Jemal .

en.lifeSummary: When Gamail Lord of Carrick was born about 1205, in Carrick, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick, was 32 and his mother, Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick, was 28. He had at least 1 daughter with Unknown. He died in 1275, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gamail Lord of Carrick est né environ 1205, à Carrick, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Unknown. Il est décédé en 1275, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gamail Lord of Carrick um 1205 in Carrick, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick 32 und seine Mutter Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick 28. Er hatte mit Unknown mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1275 im Alter von 71 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gamail Lord of Carrick è nato il circa 1205 nel Carrick, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Unknown. Morì nel 1275, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gamail Lord of Carrickが約1205年にスコットランドアルグイルカーリックで生まれた時，父Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrickは32歳，母Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrickは28歳であった。彼はUnknownとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1275年に71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gamail Lord of Carrick(이)가 대략 1205년 스컷랜드 아그이 카릭에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Unknown(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1275년 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gamail Lord of Carrick nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Carrick, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Unknown. Ele faleceu em 1275, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gamail Lord of Carrick родился около 1205 г. в местности каррикк, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick, 28. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Unknown. Он умер в 1275 г. в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gamail Lord of Carrick nació aproximadamente 1205, en Carrick, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Unknown. Murió en 1275, a la edad de 71 años.
